subcodes.first_line: O ye two pilgrims of musk-laden breath! Praise ye the Lord, your Object of worship, for ye have attained unto the ultimate goal of the jewels of existence [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای دو زائر مشکین نفس حمد کنید حضرت معبود را که بمنتها مقصود جواهر وجود فائز
subcodes.subjects: @law of pilgrimage, @power of prayer, @thankfulness; gratitude, @Shrines and Holy places, @praise and encouragement
